transcript: Had a strange moment this morning that unsettled me quite a lot. I was trying to tell the radio presenter to be quiet and I could not think of the word for the thing you use to open wine. I knew exactly what it was, I could picture it sitting in the kitchen drawer, but the word would not come. It took me nearly ten minutes. Corkscrew. Obviously corkscrew. I am sure it happens to everyone but it gave me a real fright. I did not mention it to anyone. Had a normal afternoon watching television.
